_meta.description: Skill stat/damage contributions, sourced from darkanddarker.wiki.spellsandguns.com class pages (fetched 2026-07-17). `stats` uses the same raw attribute keys as items/perks (see ATTR_RULES); conditional skills apply only when toggled on in the Skills panel. `damage` is a hit list in the same base/scaling shape as spells.json — `type` picks whether it scales off Physical or Magical Power Bonus and which DR/penetration applies.
_meta.coverage: Partial — only skills with clear, single-target numeric effects are modeled. Memory skills (spell/music/sorcery/shapeshift memory), pure mobility (Backstep, Tumbling, Hide, Shadowstep), pure CC (Dissonance, Cut Throat, Weakpoint Attack), demon-form/shapeshift-form skills, and multi-mechanic skills (Blood Pact, Arcane Shield's absorb-then-explode, trap-placement skills like Caltrops) are omitted. Extend as needed.
_meta.user_flag: 2026-07-17: skills (e.g. Warlock Blow of Corruption) did not affect Calculations; this file + skillTotals()/simulateSkillDamage() fixes it.

smite.conditional: Active (7s) — adds to every melee hit
